signals.headline: Earlier Context:**
signals.raw:
Earlier Context:**

In December 2025, Powell stated that Trump's tariffs were driving "most" of the inflation overshoot above the Fed's 2% target[1]. Powell projected total PCE inflation at 2.9% for 2025 and 2.4% for 2026, with the expectation that tariff effects would be "relatively short-lived"[1].
